history.post_text: Today's name is Kala-bhairava-devaya. The Divine Lord Kalabhairava, revered deity of time and transcendence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-kalaya. The destroyer of destruction, the Lord who conquers time itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-danda-dhrite. Wielder of the rod of time, upholder of divine judgment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalatmane. The soul of time, pervading and animating all existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kama-mantratmane. Embodiment of the desire-inciting mantra, the essence of creative will. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kasika-pura-nayakaya. Protector and lord of the sacred city of Kashi. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karuna-varidhaye. Ocean of compassion for his devotees. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kanta-militaya. The beloved, ever-residing in the hearts of his devotees. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalika-tanave. Destroyer of all strife and calamities. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-jaya. Victorious over time, transcending all temporal limitation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kukkuta-arudhaya. Mounted upon a rooster, symbol of vigilance and victory over ignorance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapaline. Bearer of the skull, symbol of detachment from worldly existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalanemi-ghne. Destroyer of the demon Kalanemi, vanquisher of obstacles and ignorance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-kanthaya. The dark-throated one, bearing the poison of the cosmic ocean. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kataksa-anugrahita-akhila-sevakaya. Whose gracious glance blesses all his devotees. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapala-karparotkrista-bhiksa-patra-dharaya. Holder of the uplifted skull-bowl, symbolizing renunciation and sacred detachment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kavaye. The supreme poet and knower of all wisdom. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalpanta-dahanakaya. Whose form is the cosmic fire at the end of an age. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-nidhi-kala-dharaya. Adorned with the moon, repository of arts and knowledge. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapala-malika-bhusaya. Adorned with a garland of skulls, signifying victory over ego and mortality. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kali-kula-vara-pradaya. Bestower of boons to the lineage of Kala, the stream of destinies. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalii-kalavatii-diiksa-samskara-upasana-priyaya. Delighting in initiation, purification, and worship for those who seek the mysteries of Kali. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalika-daksa-parsva-sthaya. Seated at the right side of Goddess Kali, embodying fierce protection. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kali-vidya-svarupa-vate. Embodiment of the knowledge needed in the Kali age. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalii-kurca-sama-yukta-bhuvana-kuta-bhasuraya. Resplendent amid the seed powers that hold the universe together. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalii-dhyana-japa-asakta-hrda-akarana-vasakaya. Whose heart is absorbed in meditation and mantra-japa of Kali. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalika-varivastyaadi-pradhana-kalpa-padapaya. The primordial wish-fulfilling tree rooted in the essence of Kali. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kali-ugra-vasava-brahmii-pramukha-carya-nayakaya. Leader among the divine powers who preside in the Kali Yuga. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kankala-malika-dharine. Wearer of a garland of bones and skulls, victor over death. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamaniya-jata-dharaya. Beautifully adorned with matted locks. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kona-rekhastha-bhadrastha-pradesa-bindu-pithakaya. Whose sacred seat rests in the subtle bindu of the auspicious mystical field. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kadalii-karaviiraka-kanjha-homa-arcana-priyaya. One who delights in worship offered with sacred flowers. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kurma-pithadi-sakti-isaya. Resting upon the cosmic tortoise-seat and primordial Shakti. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-kastha-adhipalakaya. Guardian of the furthest reaches of time. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Katha-bhrave. The one whose terrible roar removes impurity and obstruction. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kama-sancarane. He who moves according to his own divine will. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kama-araye. Enemy of desire, destroyer of illusion born of lust. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kama-rupa-vate. Possessing the power to assume any form at will. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kanthadi-sarva-cakrasthaya. Residing in all chakras from the throat upward. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kriyadi-koti-diipakaya. Illuminator of countless paths of action. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karna-hiina-upavitapaya. Adorned with an unusual sacred thread, signifying supreme renunciation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kanaka-acala-deha-vate. Possessing a body radiant like a golden mountain. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kandhara-karada-hara-agasabha-asura-murti-mate. Of splendid form, radiant with skull-garlands and terrible beauty. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapala-mocana-antaya. Liberator from the sin of Brahmahatya, remover of deep impurity. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-rajaya. King of time, sovereign over its dominion. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kriya-pradaya. Bestower of action and its proper fruit. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karana-adhipataye. Lord of all causes, primal source behind manifestation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karma-karakaya. Agent of all action, orchestrator of karma. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kartri-nayakaya. Supreme doer and leader of all action. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kanthadya-akhila-desa-ahi-bhusana-adhyaya. Adorned with all directions as ornaments. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-atmakaya. The very embodiment of time. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karma-khanda-adhipaya. Overlord of the realms of action and destiny. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kilbisa-mocine. Remover of sin and releaser from faults. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kama-kosthakaaya. Dweller in the womb of desire, granter of cherished wishes. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-kantha-rava-nandine. Rejoicing in the sweet song of the night bird. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karma-sraddha-vara-pradaya. Bestower of steadfast faith in righteous action. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gunabha-kirna-gandhara-sancarane. Pervading the subtle essences of qualities, fragrance, and inner refinement. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gaumati-smitaya. Possessor of a gentle smile and serene wisdom. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kinkini-manju-nirvana-kati-sutara-virajitaya. Adorned with a waist-belt of tinkling bells that sing of liberation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalyana-krt-kali-dhvamsine. Benefactor who destroys the darkness of the Kali Yuga. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karma-saksine. Witness to all actions performed by all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Krita-jnapaya. Known and honored through his deeds. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karala-damstraya. Possessor of frightful fangs that terrify evil forces. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kandarpa-darpa-ghnaya. Shatterer of the pride of Kama, the god of desire. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kama-bhedanaya. Piercer of desire, remover of lust and craving. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kala-guru-vilioptangaya. Whose limbs are adorned in dark and majestic beauty. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kadara-artha-abhaya-pradaya. Granter of fearlessness to the distressed and anxious. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalantika-bhara-daya. Bearer of the end of time, symbol of final dissolution and renewal. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kali-bhakta-loka-avara-pradaya. Bestower of boons to the devotees of Kali. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaminii-kancanaa-bhakta-mocakaya. Liberator from attachment to lust and gold. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kamala-iksanaya. He whose eyes are as beautiful as lotus petals. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
